title: Speaking Skill in English of Primary Students
author: Nibedita Priyadarshani
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
The main objective of the study was to know the interests of private school students towards English 
as well as to ascertain the status of teaching learning in English at private primary school by survey 
method. With the help of tools like self prepared questionnaire, interview and classroom observation 
facts were gathered from 35 students and five teachers. Quantitative and qualitative methods of 
analysis were adopted to find out result. 80% of students like English as a subject but 60% of students 
were afraid of speaking because of fear of being wrong, shyness and source of humor. Opportunity to 
speaking second language was not up to the standard.
